name: polish-history-quest
description: A browser-based interactive learning game for adults learning Polish history.

scripts.build: vite build && node scripts/verify-built-static.mjs && node scripts/inline-dist.mjs
scripts.test: node scripts/verify-content.mjs && node scripts/verify-curriculum.mjs && node scripts/verify-progress.mjs && node scripts/verify-learning-ui.mjs
